title: Call: What is the primary purpose...
summary: Identify the purpose of a call option as the right to buy at a specified price.
prompt: What is the primary purpose of a call option?

options.text: The primary purpose of a call option is to give the holder the right, but not

solution: The primary purpose of a call option is to give the holder the right, but not the obligation, to buy an underlying asset at a specified strike price before the option expires. This is a fundamental concept in options trading.
